message:
feat(engine): wire RuntimeConfig into governance, gates, orchestrator, interpreter, and optimization subsystems

Expand RuntimeConfig with CVaR ratio thresholds and ExtensionHostConfig
(re-exported from frankenengine-extension-host crate as single source
of truth), then connect it to subsystems:

- runtime_config: add critical/elevated CVaR ratio millionths to
  DecisionThresholdsConfig; replace local ExtensionHostConfig with
  pub use from extension-host crate; new validation and tests
- expected_loss_selector: CVaR thresholds read from config
- frontier_hole_governance: GovernanceConfig::from_runtime_config()
- oracle_release_gate: gate conditions from GatesConfig
- stdlib_workload_verification: verification from GatesConfig
- scalar_replacement_engine: ScalarReplacementConfig from OptimizationConfig
- versioned_rewrite_pack: canonicality limits from OptimizationConfig
- hindsight_escalation_bundle: cost budget from GatesConfig
- Cargo.toml/lock: add frankenengine-extension-host dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
